title: Twitch Video
description: Represents a video on Twitch, including VODs (archives of past streams), highlights, and uploads.

stream_id.description: ID of the stream the video was recorded from (null for uploads)

user_id.description: ID of the user who owns the video

user_login.description: Login name of the user who owns the video

user_name.description: Display name of the user who owns the video

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the video was created

published_at.description: UTC timestamp when the video was published

url.description: URL to view the video on Twitch

thumbnail_url.description: URL template for the video thumbnail

view_count.description: Number of times the video has been viewed

duration.description: Duration of the video in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 3h21m10s)
Duration of the muted segment in seconds

offset.description: Offset in the video where the muted segment begins in seconds

muted_segments.description: Segments of the video that are muted
